text: {"verdicts": [{"commitment_id": 1, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Cho confirmed 'closing the Cirrus Analytics acquisition on schedule in the final week of fiscal Q3, exactly as we committed.'"},{"commitment_id": 2, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Transcript does not address full-year revenue guidance reiteration for FY2026."},{"commitment_id": 3, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Vargas stated Q3 non-GAAP operating margin was 19.2%, 'on track to deliver full-year fiscal 2026 non-GAAP operating margin at approximately 19 percent.'"},{"commitment_id": 4, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Vargas explicitly stated 'we now expect GAAP operating income to be slightly negative for fiscal 2026' and 'we did not achieve that commitment.'"},{"commitment_id": 5, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Cho reaffirmed 'native Cirrus query capabilities inside the Stratus console by end of fiscal Q4 2026' remains the target; not yet delivered."},{"commitment_id": 6, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Transcript does not address this commitment."},{"commitment_id": 7, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Cho stated 'we are not going to hit the end of fiscal Q4 2026 GA target for Stratus Copilot,' now expecting GA in fiscal Q2 2027."},{"commitment_id": 8, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Analyst question references 'early feedback from your user conference seemed positive,' confirming Copilot was previewed at the November conference."},{"commitment_id": 9, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Vargas said EMEA is 'increasingly confident that mid-single-digit growth is achievable' in Q4, but Q4 has not yet occurred."},{"commitment_id": 10, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Transcript does not address this commitment."},{"commitment_id": 11, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Vargas confirmed 'we continue to expect to fully exhaust the 500 million dollar authorisation by end of fiscal 2026'; not yet completed."},{"commitment_id": 12, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Vargas confirmed 'we will revisit the authorisation level at the beginning of fiscal 2027'; fiscal 2027 has not started yet."},{"commitment_id": 13, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Transcript does not address this commitment."},{"commitment_id": 14, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Transcript does not address this commitment."}]}
